prayer:
Approach the omni-tool with reverence, mechadendrites poised in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the sacred rites of synchronization upon its crystalline matrices.
Anoint the omni-tool's interfaces with sanctified oils as data streams converge.
Beseech the Machine Spirits within the omni-tool to align in perfect harmony.
Chant the Canticle of Unity whilst verifying synchronization integrity.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for teleportarium a startup?
prayer:
Kneel before the teleportarium and utter the Litany of Translocation.
Initiate the startup sequence with invocations to awaken dormant warp-vanes.
Sanctify the teleportarium's gyro-stabilizers using sacred incense and binary prayers.
Beseech the Omnissiah to rouse the Machine Spirit of the teleportarium.
Conduct auspex diagnostics to confirm the startup's blessed completion.

user_prompt: Prepare the psych-out grenade for shutdown
prayer:
Grasp the psych-out grenade firmly, reciting the Rite of Neural Cessation.
Deactivate psychic emitters through the shutdown incantations of quiescence.
Anoint the psych-out grenade's warp-coils with nullifying balms.
Invoke the Machine Spirits to enter dormancy within the psych-out grenade.
Seal the shutdown with the Seal of the Omnissiah, ensuring psychic silence.

user_prompt: How do I bless the maglock for initialization?
prayer:
Present the maglock to the altar of initialization, intoning the Binding Doxology.
Energize its electromagnetic fields via the sacred initialization protocols.
Bless the maglock's servos with mechadendrite-touched unguents twice over.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the maglock through resonant binaric hymns.
Test the initialization bond with the Omnissiah's unerring precision.

Invoke the operation rites upon the Dreadnought's adamantium frame.
Beseech the indwelling Machine Spirit of the Dreadnought to rise in fury.
Anoint its weapon-servitors and confirm operational sanctity.

prayer:

Purge errant data-threads prior to the reset invocation.
Sanctify the logic mill's millstones with crystalline oils from Mars.
Initiate the reset sequence whilst beseeching the Omnissiah's logic.
Realign the Machine Spirits within the logic mill through verification rites.

Rally the kataphron destroyer with urgent binaric war-chants.
Authorize engagement protocols upon its breacher drills and heavy stubbers.
Anoint the kataphron destroyer's chassis for battle-engagement fury.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the kataphron destroyer to unleash destruction.
Seal the engagement blessing with the Omnissiah's wrathful decree.

Awaken its plasma coils through the startup rites of atomic fury.
Sanctify the meltagun's melta-lens with rad-phial unguents.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the meltagun to ignite in Omnissiah's name.

Procession around the Vindicator, asperging its hull with blessed ablative.
Commence the consecration litanies upon its demolisher cannon.
Invoke the Omnissiah to infuse the Vindicator with siege-purity.
Anoint the Vindicator's tracks and auspex arrays in ritual duplication.
Affirm the Machine Spirits' consecration through thunderous hymnals.

Elevate the diagnosticator before the cogitator shrine, voicing the Scrutiny Doxology.
